data.description: U.S. futures decline, with S&P 500 e-minis down 0.2% and Nasdaq futures off 0.3%.

China sets lowest GDP growth target in decades China has set its 2026 GDP growth target at 4.5–5 per cent, the lowest in decades, down from last year’s “around 5 per cent” target and actual 5 per cent growth in 2025, while maintaining a higher fiscal deficit of 4 per cent,
A fresh wave of Iranian missiles is fired toward Israel.
European markets open mixed as EuroStoxx 50 futures dip 0.1%, DAX futures off 0.2%, and FTSE futures gain 0.4%.
Axios reports that Venezuela’s state mining firm has inked a deal to export as much as 1,000 kg of gold to the United States.

data.title: CJ 4DPLEX's 4DX format sees 40.18% growth in India in 2025, highest-grossing year ever.
data.description: A successful blend of Indian and Hollywood movies propelled 4DX to its most profitable year in India, experiencing a significant 40.18% increase in box office revenue. The growth was announced by CJ 4DPLEX, a top producer of high-quality film formats and cinema technologies, on March 4, 2026, in Burbank, California. This achievement demonstrates the strong appeal of the diverse movie offerings from both industries, contributing to the company's record-breaking financial success.

data.title: Express Employment Professionals sees strong year-end momentum and strategic expansion with revenues of $3.67 billion in 2025, 850 offices, and 406,000 employed.
data.description: Express is set to achieve growth through new vertical offerings and a focus on people. By 2025, the company forecasts revenues of $3.67 billion across the U.S., Canada, South Africa, Australia, and New Zealand. With 850 offices, Express employs a workforce of 406,000 individuals. Its emphasis on modern workforce solutions is expected to drive continued success.

data.title: ADSQUIRE named 2026 Google Premier Partner, among top 3% of successful Google ads agencies. Leader in Legal PPC and AI.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, ADSQUIRE, a prominent digital marketing and paid media company based in Philadelphia, proudly revealed its selection as a Google Premier Partner for 2026. This prestigious recognition is bestowed by Google upon top-performing agencies, with only the top 3% of successful Google ads agencies achieving this status.

data.title: Captain Kirk showcases X Money as limited beta launches, offering a glimpse into Elon Musk's crypto with screenshots.
data.description: Hints into the functionality of Elon Musk's X Money were shared in screenshots by movie star William Shatner.

data.title: Global biogas market projected to reach 28.34 GW by 2031 with 4.59% CAGR, up from 21.65 GW in 2025.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of March 4, 2026, recent data from Mordor Intelligence indicates significant growth in the global biogas market. Starting at 21.65 GW in 2025, the market has expanded to 22.64 GW in 2026 and is estimated to surge further to 28.34 GW by 2031. This growth trend represents a 4.59% Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR). The biogas sector is gaining momentum on a global scale, showcasing promising development prospects.
Amodei meets with Deputy Hegseth to reach an agreement on Anthropic’s role in defense applications, reports the Financial Times.

data.title: Allosteric Bioscience targets aging with advanced tech. Focus on Lamin A, Tryptophan Metabolism for longevity optimization.
data.description: Allosteric Bioscience, Inc., based in New York, is employing an innovative approach using Genetics, Genomics, Systems Biology, Quantum Computing, Advanced Proprietary AI, and Proprietary Molecular Technologies to delve into and regulate the Molecular Mechanism of Aging and Longevity. Their primary objective is to enhance the aging process and prolong longevity. The focus is on crucial aging factors such as Lamin A, vital for maintaining optimal cellular function, and Tryptophan Metabolism, a key player in numerous aging-related illnesses. This cutting-edge research aims to enhance our understanding of aging mechanisms and potentially boost lifespan.
China aims to facilitate domestic demand by setting up a 100 billion yuan special fund for fiscal and financial coordination, officials report.
China will boost consumption in offline channels and lower-tier markets, according to an official report.

data.title: AI in legal industry: Hall & Wilcox case study highlights adoption with three-phase framework by partner Steve Johns. #AI #LegalTech
data.description: In a recent development, Steve Johns, a partner at Hall & Wilcox, has revealed a structured approach to incorporating artificial intelligence (AI) within law firms. This framework comprises three main phases. Initially, the focus is on incorporating AI into daily operations within the firm. Subsequently, the second phase involves leveraging AI to enhance and streamline client services. The final phase is aimed at completely reimagining the ways in which legal services are provided to clients, with AI playing a central role in transforming the delivery of legal assistance. This innovative approach by Johns signifies a strategic and forward-thinking outlook towards the integration of AI technologies within the legal sector.
The Financial Times reports that Anthropic’s CEO has returned to negotiations with the Pentagon on an AI agreement.
According to the French Interior Ministry, security around U.S. and Israeli assets is being reinforced amid concerns about the Iranian opposition.
Army identifies fifth US service member killed in Kuwait drone attack-FOX NEWS
The CSI Rare Earth Industry Index in China is poised to open up 2% as authorities move to strengthen exploration and stockpiling of key minerals.
China’s SSE Star Chip Index is set to open 3% higher after the country pledged to boost self-reliance and strength in science and technology.
